ai_home.title: Centralize your workflow in a single launchpad
ai_home.description: Reorder models, jump straight back into your active session, or open sites in a new tab. This serves as a quick-start layer for your AI workspace.
ai_home.home_state: You are on the home view
ai_home.home_state_description: Pick a model or site below to quickly start your first AI session.
ai_home.active_ready_description: You can return to the tab, open another model, or reorder your collection.
ai_home.open_tabs_detail: Your current AI sessions are accessible here as quick-switch cards.
ai_home.models_detail: Reorder the models you use most and open them with a single click.
ai_home.sites_detail: Keep external resources readily available within your AI workspace.
ai_home.empty_sites_description: Add YouTube or other working sites to turn this view into a powerful launchpad.

sites_description: Add regular websites here. These sites will not have selector saving, they will only open as web views.
appearance_description: Customize app appearance, bar position and background settings.
auto_send_hint_off: Review the note before sending it.
auto_send_hint_on: Selections go straight to the active AI tab.
bar_drag_hint: Drag to reposition the menu button
bg_random_mode_desc: Blobs will change to random beautiful colors autonomously.
clear_cache_desc: Clears Chromium Cache, Code Cache, and GPUCache without signing you out
browser_fallback_description: This app is designed to run only inside Electron or a desktop environment so it can access the file system and local integrations. Browser preview is not supported.
confirm_delete_all_selectors: Are you sure you want to delete all selectors?
confirm_delete_selectors: Are you sure you want to delete selectors for this AI?
drop_files_desc: Drag & drop PDF files here or use the buttons above
drop_pdf_here: Drop PDF here or click to select
error_corrupt_file: PDF file is corrupt or invalid
error_focus_failed: Could not focus on the input field
error_focus_script_failed: Failed to focus AI input field
error_button_not_found: Send button not found. Try re-picking selectors.
error_input_not_found: AI input field not found. Try reloading the page.
error_pdf_load: Failed to load PDF. Please try again.
error_script_failed: Failed to input text into AI
error_selector_repick_required: Selectors no longer match the page. Open the AI tab and pick them again.
error_submit_not_ready: The attachment is still processing. Wait a moment and try again.
error_submit_ready_script_failed: Failed to prepare attachment readiness check.
error_send_failed: Failed to send text. Make sure AI page is loaded.
error_browser_not_found: No supported browser found. Please install Google Chrome or Chromium.
error_login_timeout: Login timed out. Please complete sign-in and try again.
error_challenge_required: Google verification challenge detected. Please complete verification in the browser and retry.
error_login_cancelled: Login window was closed before completion.
error_login_verification_failed: Login completed but session could not be verified in app.
error_gws_disabled: Google AI web apps are disabled. Enable them from settings.
error_restricted_location: Cannot load files from this location
gws_feature_disabled: Feature flag is disabled. Remove GEMINI_WEB_SESSION_ENABLED or set it to 1/true.
gws_state_disabled: Google AI web apps are disabled.
gws_state_authenticated: Shared Google web session is healthy and authenticated.
gws_state_degraded: Session health is degraded. Manual check recommended.
gws_state_auth_required: Authentication is required for Google AI web apps.
gws_supported_apps_hint: Choose which Google destinations should appear here. They are removed from the general Models and Sites settings and managed only in this section.
gws_shared_account_note: Gemini, NotebookLM, AI Studio, YouTube, and Google Drive can reuse the same Google account session. Google Drive still uses the shared session from the PDF panel, while the apps above are managed only from this section.
gws_toolbar_authenticated: Google AI web session is ready.
gws_toolbar_auth_required: Google AI web session requires sign-in.
gws_toolbar_reauth_required: Google AI web session requires reauthentication.
gws_toolbar_degraded: Google AI web session should be checked.
gws_overlay_description: Complete sign-in or any required Google verification in the Playwright browser. This screen will close automatically as soon as the flow finishes.
gws_warning_title: Google AI Web Session Risk Notice
gws_warning_intro: This feature uses shared web-session and browser-profile persistence instead of an official API. Review the following risks before using Gemini, NotebookLM, or AI Studio this way.
gws_risk_unofficial: This is not an official integration; flow can break suddenly when Google changes behavior.
gws_risk_challenge: Google security steps (2FA, verification, captcha/challenge) may be triggered unexpectedly.
gws_risk_expiry: Session cookies can expire or be invalidated; periodic reauthentication may be required.
gws_risk_profile_access: Web session is stored in a local profile; shared devices can increase privacy exposure.
gws_risk_behavior_changes: If Gemini, NotebookLM, AI Studio, or Google sign-in pages change, auth detection and health checks may become inaccurate.
gws_risk_multi_device: Device/IP/network changes can cause sign-out events or forced reauthentication.
gws_mitigation_dedicated_profile: Prefer a dedicated account/profile for this feature when possible.
gws_mitigation_stable_network: Use the same device and a stable network whenever possible.
gws_mitigation_manual_reauth: Do not expect automatic bypass for security prompts; reauthenticate manually.
gws_mitigation_no_shared_machine: Do not leave this feature enabled on shared machines.
gws_official_warning: This workflow is based on shared web-session persistence and is not an official API integration.
language_description: Select your interface language. Changes will be applied immediately.
models_description: You can turn on/off the AI models you want to use. At least one model must be active.
name: Name
no_selectors_hint: Use the Magic Picker in the AI webview to define custom selectors.
gdrive_pdf_desc: Access Drive with the same shared Google session from the PDF panel.
picker_hint_button_send: This is a clickable button - Looks correct for sending!
picker_hint_clickable: This area looks clickable, might be correct.
picker_hint_div_input: This is an area used for text input. Correct choice.
picker_hint_form: You selected the whole form. Please click only the input field inside it.
picker_hint_generic_box: This is too generic. Please focus on where you directly type or click.
picker_hint_icon: You clicked just the icon. Please click the button itself that contains this icon!
picker_hint_input_correct: Perfect! This is the text input area. Correct choice.
picker_hint_submit_correct: Great! This looks like a send button. Correct choice.
picker_hint_text: You clicked just text. Please click the button or box containing it.
picker_hint_textarea_perfect: Bullseye! This is the main text box. Perfect choice.
picker_intro_text: Find the text box where you type your questions or messages and click on it. This teaches the system where to write.
picker_started_hint: Element Picker Mode Started. Please click on the Input and then the Send button in order.
picker_submit_text: Click on the button (usually an arrow or plane icon) that you click to send your message.
picker_typing_text: If the 'Send' button is hidden, type a single letter into the box to make it appear. If it's already there, you can proceed.
report_issue_desc: Create a one-click diagnostic log package for GitHub issue reports.
prompts_description: Select a prompt to automatically prepend to your messages or images.
recent_invalid_hint: File was not found. You can remove this entry or re-open the file manually.
resume_empty_desc: It will appear here after you open a PDF.
resume_reading_desc: Your recently opened files are listed here. Click one to continue.
pdf_pan_mode: Pan — drag to move the page (zoom in first if needed)
selection_color_desc: Personalize text selection and AI send button color.
selectors_description: AI site selectors you defined with the element picker are listed here. Green indicator means a custom selector is defined for that site.
selectors_description_simple: View and manage custom selectors for your AI sites. Selectors allow the app to automatically input text and click buttons. Regular websites do not support selector saving.
selectors_repick_warning: The saved selectors are no longer reliable for this site. Open the AI tab and run Magic Picker again before sending.
selectors_test_no_config: No selectors are saved for this AI yet.
selectors_test_requires_active_tab: Open this AI on the current tab to test or re-pick selectors.
ai_send_text_placeholder: Write what you want the AI to do. The selected text will be included below.
ai_send_image_placeholder: Write the note to send with this image.
show_only_icons_desc: Hide text labels, show only icons.
toast_invalid_folder_name: You entered an invalid folder name
tut_disclaimer: ChatGPT can make mistakes. Check important info.
tut_example_site_desc: How can I help you today?
tut_select_btn_desc: The send button is now visible. Hover and CLICK it to teach the AI how to send.
tut_select_input_desc: Hover over the input box below and CLICK to select it. This tells the AI where to type.
tut_success_desc: Excellent! You have successfully mapped the input and send button.
tut_type_msg_desc: Now act like a user. Type "hello" in the box to reveal the send button.
tut_welcome_desc: Learn how to teach the AI to control websites. Click "Start" to begin.
tutorial_button_desc: Learn how to use the Magic Selector with a guided simulation.
ua_step1_text: Access the tools panel and model list from here.
ua_step2_text: Switch active AI or use helper tools.
ua_step3_text: Manually define input boxes and submit buttons on AI websites.
ua_step4_text: Quickly swap positions of the PDF reader and AI panel.
ua_step5_text: Manage app language, appearance, and other advanced options here.
usage_assistant_desc: Starts the interactive guide for the application.
webview_crashed_max: Page keeps crashing. Please restart the app.
toast_gws_login_failed: Google AI web login could not be started
toast_gws_check_failed: Google AI web session check failed
toast_gws_reset_failed: Google AI web profile reset failed
toast_gws_toggle_failed: Google AI web enable/disable update failed
toast_gws_apps_failed: Google AI app visibility update failed
toast_copy_failed: Failed to copy image to clipboard
toast_validate_script_failed: Failed to generate selector validation script
toast_submit_ready_script_failed: Failed to generate submit-ready wait script
